evals.description: Full synthesis from mixed sources — verifies themes, language patterns, and JTBD output

data_points.text: Setting up the integration took me three hours and I still had to contact support to finish it.
Onboarding is way too complicated. The docs don't match the current UI.
Customer keeps submitting tickets about the initial setup flow being confusing.
I was drowning in spreadsheets before I switched to this tool.
The setup complexity almost made us cancel in the first week.
Once it's set up it just works. I set it and forget it now.
Finally a tool where I can trust the numbers without reconciling everything manually.
We were literally drowning in spreadsheets managing campaigns across clients.

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
synthesis_date is present in YYYY-MM-DD format
synthesis_goal is 'all'
total_data_points is 8
sources_analyzed object has keys for each source_type present in the data
themes is an array with at least 1 entry (minimum 2 data points per theme)
Each theme has id, name, summary, frequency, frequency_pct, intensity_score, confidence, confidence_reason, source_types_present, segment_skew, verbatim_quotes, and subclusters fields
themes[].confidence is one of 'High', 'Medium', or 'Low'
themes[].intensity_score is a number between 0 and 1
verbatim_quotes in each theme are copied exactly from input data — not paraphrased
language_patterns is present (synthesis_goal includes 'language_patterns')
language_patterns contains problem_language, success_language, trigger_language, and comparison_language arrays
Each language pattern entry has phrase, instances, and example fields
'drowning in spreadsheets' appears as a problem_language phrase (appears 2x in input)
jtbd is present (synthesis_goal includes 'jtbd')
jtbd entries have type, job, frequency, and evidence_quote fields
jtbd[].type is one of 'functional', 'emotional', or 'social'
sample_bias_flags is a non-empty array
summary object contains top_theme, themes_count, confidence_distribution, data_sufficiency, and data_sufficiency_note fields
Output contains no strategic recommendations — synthesized findings only

evals.description: themes-only synthesis — language_patterns and jtbd are null

data_points.text: Pricing is too high for what you get.
The value for money is questionable at this price point.

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
synthesis_goal is 'themes'
themes array is present and non-empty
language_patterns is null (synthesis_goal excludes it)
jtbd is null (synthesis_goal excludes it)

evals.description: Fewer than 5 data points — returns structured error
assertions: Returns JSON with an error field
error value is 'insufficient_data' or similar
data_points_received is 2
minimum_required field is present (5)
